creator: mju@panasas.com
text:
The Makefile for converters/kdesupport2 does not list a dependency
on Qt 2.2.1, despite the fact that the mimelib.3 shared library requires
it.  This causes compilation of this library to fail on systems
that do not already have Qt 2.2.1 installed.

This is present in CVS v1.40 (2000/10/29 03:09:48) of the Makefile.

How-To-Repeat: Try to "make install" in x11/kde2 on a system without Qt 2.2.1.
The build will fail when it tries to configure mimelib.3.
